title: The whole world was lost in the darkness of sin
firstLine: The whole world was lost in the darkness of sin;
publicDomainBasis: Philip Paul Bliss (1838–1876), Philip Paul Bliss (1838–1876). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
Chorus
sections.text:
No darkness have we who in Jesus abide,
The light of the world is Jesus;
We walk in the light when we follow our Guide,
The light of the world is Jesus.

sections.label: Chorus
